title: Mermaid diagram export hook with SVG and PNG functionality
purpose: Provides React hook for exporting Mermaid diagrams as SVG or PNG files with proper styling and scaling.
module_context: Exports a hook function that manages diagram export state and provides SVG/PNG export capabilities with inline style handling and canvas-based PNG conversion.

steps.content: Retrieve computed styles for the given element.
Apply the computed styles as inline styles to the element.
Recursively process all child elements to inline their styles as well.
Create a new anchor element for file download.
Set the href attribute to the provided blob URL.
Set the download attribute to the specified filename.
Add the anchor to the document body.
Trigger a click event on the anchor to initiate download.
Remove the anchor from the document body after download.
Initialize a ref to track the container element.
Initialize state to track whether export is possible.
Define a callback to update the container ref and export state.
Define a function to export the diagram as SVG with inline styles.
Define a function to export the diagram as PNG using canvas rendering.
Return the container ref callback and both export functions along with export capability state.
Update the internal container reference to the provided node.
IF the node is null, set export capability to false.
ELSE check if the container has an SVG element and update export capability accordingly.
Retrieve the container element from the ref.
IF the container is null, exit the function.
Find the SVG element within the container.
IF no SVG element exists, exit the function.
Create a deep clone of the SVG element.
Inline styles for the cloned SVG element and its children.
Serialize the styled SVG to a string.
Create a blob from the SVG string and generate a download URL.
Trigger file download with the specified filename.
Revoke the object URL to free memory.
Retrieve the container element from the ref.
IF the container is null, resolve the promise and exit.
Find the SVG element within the container.
IF no SVG element exists, resolve the promise and exit.
Determine the dimensions of the SVG element.
IF getBBox fails, fall back to client dimensions for sizing.
Create a deep clone of the SVG element.
Inline styles for the cloned SVG element and its children.
Serialize the styled SVG to a data URL.
Create a canvas element with 2x retina scaling.
Set canvas dimensions to match the SVG size multiplied by 2.
Set canvas scaling to 2x for high resolution rendering.
Set a timeout to prevent hanging during image loading.
Create an image element and set its source to the SVG data URL.
IF image loads successfully, draw it onto the canvas.
Convert the canvas content to a PNG blob.
IF blob creation succeeds, trigger file download with the specified filename.
Revoke the object URL to free memory after download.
IF image loading fails, resolve the promise and exit.
